chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Time Which, if a Person Reaches it, They Are Considered to Have Performed Hajj

text: 2773 - رَوَى اِبْنُ أَبِي عُمَيْرٍ عَنْ هِشَامِ بْنِ اَلْحَكَمِ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : «مَنْ أَدْرَكَ اَلْمَشْعَرَ اَلْحَرَامَ عَلَى خَمْسَةٍ مِنَ اَلنَّاسِ فَقَدْ أَدْرَكَ اَلْحَجَّ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.2773 - Ibn Abi Umayr narrated from Hisham ibn al-Hakam, from Abu Abdullah (as), who said: "Whoever reaches al-Mash'ar al-Haram (the Sacred Monument) with five individuals has indeed attained Hajj."
